name: Cream Cheese Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly beat eggs in a large bowl.
2. Add the softened cream cheese, flour, sugar, and butter to the egg mixture. Mix until well combined (the mixture will be slightly chunky).
3. Spray a pre-heated 275 degree electric griddle with vegetable cooking spray.
4. Ladle teaspoonfuls of batter onto the griddle.
5. Cook pancakes until golden brown, about 3 minutes on one side.
6. Turn and cook the other side for about 2 more minutes.
7. Sprinkle pancakes with confectioners sugar and garnish with lemon wedges.
8. Serve with fresh berries, warm applesauce, or maple syrup.
